title: Building an AI-Powered Lead Management System in Minutes
pageTitle: Building an AI-Powered Lead Management System in Minutes — Last Rev
description: How AlphaClaw built a complete lead management system that scores, routes, and tracks prospects automatically.
author: Adam Harris

content:
Our sales process had a familiar problem: leads came in from multiple channels — website forms, LinkedIn messages, conference contacts, referrals — and ended up scattered across spreadsheets, email threads, and sticky notes. We asked AlphaClaw to fix it.

TL;DR: We went from scattered leads across spreadsheets and email threads to a fully automated pipeline — AI scoring, Kanban board, smart reminders — in under two hours.

The Problem

Without a unified system, leads fell through the cracks constantly. A hot prospect from a conference would sit in someone's inbox for a week. Duplicate leads from different channels created confusion. There was no scoring, no prioritization, and no pipeline visibility.

We didn't want to buy another SaaS tool with 500 features we'd never use. We wanted something lean, tailored to our process, and built fast.

What AlphaClaw Built

We described our lead workflow to AlphaClaw and it generated a complete lead management application. The system includes an intake form for manual entry, API endpoints for automated ingestion from web forms, and a Kanban-style board showing leads across stages: New, Contacted, Qualified, Proposal, and Closed.

Each lead card displays company name, contact info, source channel, estimated deal size, and an AI-generated lead score based on company size, industry fit, and engagement signals. The scoring algorithm was something AlphaClaw designed based on our description of what makes a good client for us.

Key Features

  • 📥
    Multi-channel intake Leads flow in from forms, email parsing, and manual entry into one unified pipeline
  • 🧠
    AI lead scoring Automatic 1–100 scoring based on fit criteria we defined in natural language
  • 📋
    Drag-and-drop Kanban Visual pipeline management with stage-based views
  • 📊
    Activity logging Every touch point — email sent, call made, meeting scheduled — tracked on the lead timeline
  • ⏰
    Smart reminders Leads untouched past configurable timeframes get flagged automatically

Speed of Delivery

❌ Traditional CRM

Weeks to evaluate, purchase, configure, and migrate. Training. Vendor lock-in. Support tickets for every change.

✅ AlphaClaw

First working version in 45 minutes. Iterated on scoring weights and custom fields in the next hour. Total: under 2 hours.

Results

34 Leads tracked
3× Conversion rate (top-scored)
3d → 4h Response time

In the first month, zero leads fell through the cracks. The AI scoring helped us prioritize effectively — top-scored leads converted at 3× the rate of lower-scored ones, validating the algorithm AlphaClaw designed.

The best part? When we needed to add a new field or adjust the scoring model, we just told AlphaClaw what to change. No vendor support tickets, no waiting for the next release cycle.

Ready to Build Yours?

This is what custom AI tooling looks like: exactly what you need, nothing you don't, built in minutes.
